alt: Harpy eagle with its crown feathers flared in an alert, formidable display
caption: When alert or listening for prey, the harpy eagle flares its distinct double crest to create a spectacular acoustic facial disc.
acquisitionNotes: Curated fun-fact image showing double crest flare in the wild. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/1/19/Harpia_harpyja_-_Harpy_Eagle._-_Flickr_-_gailhampshire_%281%29.jpg
attributionText: Photo by gailhampshire from Cradley, Malvern, U.K via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 2.0
